center.name: 巴利阿里群島
center.summary: 巴利阿里群島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Scopoli's shearwater，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: | date=2009 | title=Breeding shearwaters on Italian islands: population size, island selection and co-existence with their main alien predator, the black rat | journal=Rivista Italiana di Ornitologia | volume=78 | pages=83–99 | url=https://www.researchgate.net/publication/258691157 }} and on the Balearic Islands. At the end of October, after the breeding season, Scopoli's shearwaters migrate to the Atlantic and stream out of the Mediterranean through the Strait of Gibraltar. They return to the Mediterranean at the end of February
